Qi Ji śąöŚĮĄ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qi Ji (śąöŚĮĄ). Persuaded by Liu Fu to defect around the year 197. Qi Ji was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wei Kingdom. Qi Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
